title: citrus × lycopersiciformis
intro: Citrus × lycopersiciformis, also known as the tomato citrus or citrus × lycopersiciformis, is a rare and unusual plant that is a hybrid of a citrus species and the tomato plant. This unique plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Citrus × lycopersiciformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its properties and effects.
